use_cases: Displaying company methodology and workflow steps
Showcasing a multi-step process or service delivery approach
Presenting sequential information in an engaging visual format
Outlining operational procedures for potential clients
ai_summary: A process overview section component designed to display company methodology, workflow steps, or operational procedures in a structured visual format. Typically used on service or SaaS websites to showcase how a company delivers work or executes processes. The component presents sequential information that helps visitors understand business operations.
